name: a Kubernetes deployment violating multiple security rules is reported red across all of them
command:
printf 'spec:
  hostNetwork: true
  containers:
  - image: app:latest
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > deploy.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce.sh" --root . --rule g-k8s-no-privileged-container --rule g-k8s-no-host-network --rule g-k8s-no-latest-image-tag
